hero.title: Let's Look at Your Leads Together
hero.subtitle: In 15 minutes we'll walk through your leads together and figure out if this is a fit for your business.

demo.title: See It in Action
demo.description: I'll show you the full Lead Awaker setup: how the AI runs conversations, handles objections, and feeds back into your pipeline.

noCommitment.title: No Pressure
noCommitment.description: If it's not a fit, we'll know in 15 minutes. No pitch, no follow-up unless you want one.
